results.title: Pi
results.description: A monorepo containing a collection of tools designed for managing large language model (LLM) deployments and building AI agents, featuring a unified LLM API, web UI components, and a CLI.

results.title: Pi
results.description: Pi is a minimal terminal coding harness that enables developers to build extensible AI coding agents with customizable workflows, multiple model providers, and a plugin-based architecture.

results.title: Pi
results.description: Pi is a minimal terminal coding harness that enables developers to build AI-powered workflows with TypeScript extensions, skills, and packages.

results.title: PI PTC
results.description: PI PTC is an extension for pi-coding-agent that enables Python code execution with async tool calling, reducing token usage and latency for multi-tool workflows.

results.title: Pi Messenger
results.description: Pi Messenger enables multiple AI agents in different terminals to coordinate and communicate through a shared folder, featuring task orchestration, file reservations, activity tracking, and a chat overlay interface.
